commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer review should decide whether the intentional marker-suppresses-command behavior is acceptable; there is no narrow repair to queue.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff changes local TypeScript routing logic, tests, and documentation without new dependencies or permission broadening. (sha=726bdb2b0c69d45eaeab492f11b7258b27f48aac)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds proof-nudge marker detection to the comment router and webhook, skips proof-nudge candidates when live GitHub fetches fail, updates target-dispatcher docs, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the covered path: a marker-bearing comment that also contains a ClawSweeper command can be parsed by current routing code because main has no marker ignore guard. The currently generated proof-nudge copy does not appear to include an explicit command, so this is a defensive automation-routing bug path rather than the default generated copy.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should decide whether the intentional marker-suppresses-command behavior is acceptable; there is no narrow repair to queue.

target.title: Keep proof-nudge comments inert
target.body:
## Summary

- ignore proof-nudge marker comments in the webhook classifier and repair comment router so ClawSweeper does not react to its own nudge comments
- keep targeted proof-nudge dry runs resilient when live GitHub state for a sampled PR cannot be fetched
- document the target dispatcher proof-nudge ignore before command matching

## Real Behavior Proof

Representative runtime proof from the compiled webhook/router code on this branch. The marker-bearing proof-nudge comment includes an otherwise routable `@clawsweeper re-review` line, but the proof-nudge marker makes it inert; a normal command still routes.

```text
proof-nudge webhook classification: {"accepted":false,"reason":"proof nudge comment"}
proof-nudge router parse: null
normal command webhook classification: {"accepted":true,"type":"issue_comment","targetRepo":"openclaw/openclaw","targetBranch":"main","itemNumber":86422,"commentId":457,"installationId":123,"sourceAction":"created"}
normal command router parse: {"trigger":"mention","command":"re-review","intent":"re_review"}
```

## Validation

- pnpm run format:check
- pnpm run build:all
- node --test test/repair/comment-webhook.test.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- pnpm run lint:repair
- pnpm run lint:scripts
- node --test --test-name-pattern "proof nudge|proof-nudge|proof nudges" test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- representative runtime proof command above
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
